requirements.task_name: Find and copy the link to the official Shipping Policy Template article
requirements.task_description: Copy the share link for the top 'Shipping Policy Template' article in the 'Store setup' filter using the in-site 'Copy URL' control.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever copyArticleShareUrl(articleId) returns success === true (i.e., a non-empty share_url is available).
required_variables.reason: Track which article’s URL was actually copied so the evaluator can verify that it is the most popular 'Shipping Policy Template' article in the 'Store setup' category.

requirements.task_name: Use Help Center carrier comparison to select the fastest US shipping option under $10 for parcels under 2 kg
requirements.task_description: Use carrier comparison filters (US, 0–2 kg, max cost 10, sorted by fastest delivery) and then open/setup the first carrier row that matches these constraints.

required_variables.set_condition: On every successful call to getCarrierComparisonOptions(articleId, regionCode, minWeightKg, maxWeightKg, maxCostUsd, sortBy).
required_variables.value_to_set:
{
  "article_id": articleId,
  "regionCode": regionCode || null,
  "minWeightKg": (typeof minWeightKg === 'number' ? minWeightKg : null),
  "maxWeightKg": (typeof maxWeightKg === 'number' ? maxWeightKg : null),
  "maxCostUsd": (typeof maxCostUsd === 'number' ? maxCostUsd : null),
  "sortBy": sortKey,
  "first_option_id": mappedOptions.length > 0 ? mappedOptions[0].carrier_option_id : null,
  "timestamp": new Date().toISOString()
}
required_variables.reason: Record the exact filter parameters (region, weight range, max cost, sort mode) and which carrier option was first after applying 'fastest delivery' sorting, so the evaluator can confirm that the comparison was run with US / 0–2 kg / ≤$10 / fastest delivery and what the top-ranked option was.

required_variables.set_condition: When startCarrierSetup(carrierOptionId) returns success === true (i.e., setup instructions are available).
required_variables.reason: Record which carrier option the user actually chose to start setup for, so the evaluator can verify that it matches the first option from task2_lastComparison and that it meets the weight, price, and delivery-time constraints.

requirements.task_name: Find a Shopify integration setup guide with a video under 10 minutes and start the tutorial
requirements.task_description: Open a Shopify integration article that includes a video tutorial of 10 minutes or less and start playing that video.

required_variables.reason: Capture which video was started and its duration so the evaluator can verify that it belongs to a Shopify integration article and that its length is 10 minutes (600 seconds) or less.

requirements.task_name: Use Billing help docs to prepare a downgrade request from Pro to Basic with a $30/month budget
requirements.task_description: Submit a support request with category 'Billing & subscriptions', topic 'Downgrade to Basic plan', and a message mentioning 'downgrade from Pro to Basic' and '$30/month'.

requirements.task_name: Enable auto-cancellation of unfulfilled orders after 7 days using a link from the Help Center
requirements.task_description: Configure order automation so that auto-cancel for unfulfilled orders is enabled with a 7-day time limit.

requirements.task_name: Create a canned response for defective item returns using a Help Center message template
requirements.task_description: Create a new canned response based on the 'Defective item return' template, name it accordingly, categorize it under 'Returns & refunds', and include '10% discount' in the body.

requirements.task_name: Troubleshoot SYNC_409 product feed errors and report an incident via Help Center and Status pages
requirements.task_description: Submit an incident report from the Status page with error code 'SYNC_409' in the subject/description and severity 'Medium'.

requirements.task_name: Adjust payout schedule to weekly with a $100 minimum threshold using instructions from the Help Center
requirements.task_description: Set payout frequency to 'Weekly' and minimum payout threshold to 100 USD via the payout settings page opened from the Help Center.
